_comment_ignored: Per-RIG nm boot config for the rpi4 GPS-feed box. The .art default is interfaces='' (auto, eth-first); this rig has no wired uplink in the field — it rides WiFi, so it monitors + drives wlan0 and brings the VPN up on that link. Read by NmPoller::init via get_config('nm_poller'); etcd ConfigUpdated can still override live. wifi_profiles + psk are enrolled at runtime (rtdb wifi add), NOT here.
